observed_weaknesses: CLI improve accepted an empty --prompt value.
A no-prompt improve request looked successful to automation.

selected_candidate.name: improve empty input fail-closed
selected_candidate.reason: Make prompt improvement automation reject missing prompt bodies instead of returning a synthetic recommendation.
selected_candidate.success_metric: empty --prompt and empty stdin exit non-zero; non-empty local improve still exits 0.

safety_controls: Non-empty prompt behavior was smoke-tested after the change.
The change is limited to CLI argument validation.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
